summary_one_line: IHDR color_type byte at offset 0x19 must equal 3 (PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE) for png_read_end to take the true branch

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The IHDR color_type field (single byte at file offset 0x19) must hold the exact value 0x03 = PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE; the gate at pngread.c:787 compares png_ptr->color_type against PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE and only the true branch reaches when this byte parsed into color_type equals 3.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Every cmplog winner-resolving seed carries 03 at offset 0x19, and the byte-diff shows W bytes 03(.)x4 concentrated at that offset versus the loser set; cmplog's I2SRandReplace reads the color_type==PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE CMP operand from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes 3 at the input offset, planting the required palette color_type.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: naive seeds carry non-palette color_type bytes at offset 0x19 (00 dominates, plus 06/04/02) and never reach the true branch; without CMP interception naive can only land color_type=3 by blind havoc byte mutation, which it failed to do in all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog's I2SRandReplace substitution: the integer-CMP interception logs the PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE operand and the i2s mutator splices value 3 into the color_type byte, a precise single-byte fix naive's havoc-only stack cannot reliably produce.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The same byte-precise condition (color_type byte at 0x19 == 0x03) must survive intact in the produced input; the structural/generalization machinery that distinguishes grimoire from cmplog must not perturb or generalize away that exact byte.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: cmplog (no generalization/Grimoire mutators) keeps the I2S-planted color_type=03 byte intact and resolved the branch in 9/10 trials with avg hitcount 7; the byte-diff confirms W bytes 03(.)x4 fixed at offset 0x19.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: grimoire shares the full cmplog I2S stack yet loses (resolved 1/10, blocked 9/10), so the divergence is attributable to grimoire's added GeneralizationStage + Grimoire structural mutators; its grimoire-blocking seed at offset 0x19 carries non-palette bytes, indicating the generalization/structural recombination disrupts the byte-precise palette color_type that bare I2S would otherwise plant and retain.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: grimoire structural: grimoire adds GeneralizationStage (replacing concrete byte runs with <GAP>) plus Grimoire string/structural mutators on top of the identical I2S stage; that structural recombination dilutes the per-byte I2S fix of the color_type field, so the single-technique delta (grimoire_structural) actively penalizes resolution relative to plain cmplog.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker at pngread.c:787 tests color_type == PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE.
cmplog winner seeds carry 03 at offset 0x19 while losers carry non-palette bytes there.
cmplog winner-resolving seeds take the true branch.
cmplog's I2SRandReplace scans the input for one CMP operand and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive has no I2S; it can only mutate via havoc/token stack.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: **Observed `mutation_op` in seed metadata**: any of the above. No I2S.

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog beats naive at this branch with prob_div 0.90.
grimoire shares the full cmplog I2S stack and adds generalization plus Grimoire mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
grimoire builds on the full cmplog stack —
it includes the `CmpLogObserver`, the `TracingStage`, and the
`I2SRandReplace` (i2s) stage — and ADDS a `GeneralizationStage` plus
Grimoire structural mutators.

evidence_trail.claim: The single-technique delta for grimoire vs cmplog is the added generalization plus Grimoire mutators.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
The single-technique delta is therefore
`grimoire` vs `cmplog` (both have I2S; grimoire adds generalization +
Grimoire mutators), not vs naive.

evidence_trail.claim: GeneralizationStage replaces concrete byte runs with <GAP> placeholders.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
`GeneralizationStage`
replaces concrete byte runs in a corpus entry with `<GAP>` placeholders

evidence_trail.claim: cmplog wins over grimoire at this branch with prob_div 0.80.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 3892 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed a65af78004fb18e7` and observed 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 11 of the 12-level ancestor chain (ancestor 94c47bff5687a0c9), characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in cmplog under the current build

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on color_type==PALETTE where naive resolves the branch as fast as cmplog (i.e. the single color_type byte is reachable by blind havoc), which would refute that I2S byte-substitution is what gives cmplog its edge.

weakest_evidence_point: The grimoire>loss attribution to GeneralizationStage perturbation is inferential — both grimoire and cmplog have I2S, so I cannot directly observe in the seeds why grimoire fails to retain the color_type=3 byte, only that it shares the I2S stack yet loses.
